name: ocr_space
description: OCR.space free API to extract text from image
code:
import base64, requests
path = 'telegram-media/photo_1771674750723.jpg'
with open(path,'rb') as f:
    img_bytes = f.read()
enc = base64.b64encode(img_bytes).decode()
# Use OCR.space
payload = {
    'base64image': 'data:image/jpg;base64,'+enc,
    'language': 'eng',
    'isOverlayRequired': False
}
response = requests.post('https://api.ocr.space/parse/image', data=payload)
print(response.json())
